q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is self.send_header which performs HTTP network I/O

mock_guidance.target: Mock self.send_header to intercept the header name and value arguments
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the second argument passed to self.send_header on line 78, checking for CRLF sequences (\r\n) in the constructed Content-Type string
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make self.send_header a no-op that records its arguments without sending data over the network
notes: Ensure the mock replaces the method on the handler instance before do_GET is invoked
The injected payload comes from params.get('charset', 'utf8') derived from the query string
